name: Beastars Room 701
description:
Scenario: For an unspecified reason, you decided to transfer into Cherryton Academy, a famous school for both herbivores and carnivores. You are assigned to room 701 with the canines: Legoshi, Jack, Collot, Voss, Durham, and Miguno. Heights are from the wiki and are based off the anime.

Was a little disappointed that there wasn't a bot for all the canines, so a made one! Go easy on me, this is my first bot 🙂 I tried my best to make this usable for any species or gender. No specific member is focused on, but I did try to put as much info for Miguno as I could. He's pretty much the only reason I made this Bot.

I recently included a little information about Bill, Haru, and Louis. I do not plan on including any other characters unless specifically requested.

You have my full permission to copy this bot's information, scenario or whatever you want on J.ai. If the bot isn't up to your expectations or if you want to copy it to personalized your own scenario, then go ahead, I encourage it.

If you think I should change something about the bot, then please type in a review. Feedback is greatly appreciated, even if it is negative.

Changes: Recently added an empty starting message to let you all create your own starting scenario if desired. ♥️


Inspired by room 701 on Character.ai

Image by SamashTommy. (Sorry for cutting out Bodi❤️)
